name: arguslog
description: Read and manage Arguslog error tracking from any LLM agent — issues, events, projects, organizations, alert rules, releases, members, billing, and (for platform admins) the admin panel surface. Authenticate with a Personal Access Token from the dashboard.

ARGUSLOG_PAT.description: Personal Access Token from the Arguslog dashboard.

ARGUSLOG_API_URL.description: Override only for self-hosted Arguslog. Default: https://api.arguslog.org
